error_signature: TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'content')
title: TypeError in AI Agent Node Execution
symptom: When the workflow is triggered, the AI agent node throws a TypeError indicating it cannot read properties of undefined, specifically the 'content' field.
not_this_if: Error does not occur during execution of the AI agent node
root_cause: The error occurs when the AI agent node attempts to access a property of an undefined object, likely due to missing or improperly configured input data from the preceding node in the workflow.
fix_steps: Open the nodes panel in n8n
Replace it with the new version from the nodes panel
Save the workflow and re-trigger it
agent_instruction: Replace the execute workflow node with the latest version from the nodes panel.
